info.title: Knowledge API
info.description: API for managing knowledge bases, documents, chunks, metadata, and tags, including creation, retrieval, and configuration. **Note:** A single Knowledge Base API key has permission to operate on all visible knowledge bases under the same account. Please pay attention to data security.

servers.description: The base URL for the Knowledge API.

apiBaseUrl.description: Actual base URL of the API

tags.name: Knowledge Bases
tags.description: Operations for managing knowledge bases, including creation, configuration, and retrieval.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Operations for creating, updating, and managing documents within a knowledge base.

tags.name: Chunks
tags.description: Operations for managing document chunks and child chunks.

tags.name: Metadata
tags.description: Operations for managing knowledge base metadata fields and document metadata values.

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: Operations for managing knowledge base tags and tag bindings.

tags.name: Knowledge Pipeline
tags.description: Operations for managing and running knowledge pipelines, including datasource plugins and pipeline execution.

post.description: Create a new empty knowledge base. After creation, use [Create Document by Text](/api-reference/documents/create-document-by-text) or [Create Document by File](/api-reference/documents/create-document-by-file) to add documents.

indexing_technique.description: `high_quality` uses embedding models for precise search; `economy` uses keyword-based indexing.

permission.description: Controls who can access this knowledge base. `only_me` restricts to the creator, `all_team_members` grants access to the entire workspace, `partial_members` grants access to specified members.

provider.description: `vendor` for internal knowledge base, `external` for external knowledge base.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model name. Use the `model` field from [Get Available Models](/api-reference/models/get-available-models) with `model_type=text-embedding`.

embedding_model_provider.description: Embedding model provider. Use the `provider` field from [Get Available Models](/api-reference/models/get-available-models) with `model_type=text-embedding`.

retrieval_model.description: Retrieval model configuration. Controls how chunks are searched and ranked when querying this knowledge base.

external_knowledge_api_id.description: ID of the external knowledge API connection.

external_knowledge_id.description: ID of the external knowledge base.

model_name.description: Name of the model used for generating summaries.

model_provider_name.description: Provider of the summary generation model.

summary_prompt.description: Custom prompt template for summary generation.

value.name: Product Documentation
value.description: Technical documentation for the product API

409.description: `dataset_name_duplicate` : The dataset name already exists. Please modify your dataset name.

value.message: The dataset name already exists. Please modify your dataset name.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of knowledge bases. Supports filtering by keyword and tags.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter by name.

parameters.name: include_all
parameters.description: Whether to include all knowledge bases regardless of permissions.

has_more.description: Whether more items exist on the next page.

data.name: Product Documentation
data.description: Technical documentation for the product API

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific knowledge base, including its embedding model, retrieval configuration, and document statistics.

value.name: Product Documentation
value.description: Technical documentation for the product API

403.description: `forbidden` : Insufficient permissions to access this knowledge base.

value.message: Insufficient permissions to access this knowledge base.

patch.description: Update the name, description, permissions, or retrieval settings of an existing knowledge base. Only the fields provided in the request body are updated.

indexing_technique.description: `high_quality` uses embedding models for precise search; `economy` uses keyword-based indexing.

permission.description: Controls who can access this knowledge base. `only_me` restricts to the creator, `all_team_members` grants access to the entire workspace, `partial_members` grants access to specified members.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model name. Use the `model` field from [Get Available Models](/api-reference/models/get-available-models) with `model_type=text-embedding`.

embedding_model_provider.description: Embedding model provider. Use the `provider` field from [Get Available Models](/api-reference/models/get-available-models) with `model_type=text-embedding`.

retrieval_model.description: Retrieval model configuration. Controls how chunks are searched and ranked when querying this knowledge base.

partial_member_list.description: List of team members with access when `permission` is `partial_members`.

user_id.description: ID of the team member to grant access.

external_retrieval_model.description: Retrieval settings for external knowledge bases.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return.

score_threshold.description: Minimum relevance score threshold for filtering results.

score_threshold_enabled.description: Whether score threshold filtering is enabled.

external_knowledge_id.description: ID of the external knowledge base.

external_knowledge_api_id.description: ID of the external knowledge API connection.

value.name: Product Documentation
value.description: Technical documentation for the product API

403.description: `forbidden` : Insufficient permissions to access this knowledge base.

value.message: Insufficient permissions to access this knowledge base.

delete.description: Permanently delete a knowledge base and all its documents. The knowledge base must not be in use by any application.

409.description: `dataset_in_use` : The knowledge base is being used by some apps. Please remove it from the apps before deleting.

value.message: The dataset is being used by some apps. Please remove the dataset from the apps before deleting it.

post.description: Create a document from raw text content. The document is processed asynchronously — use the returned `batch` ID with [Get Document Indexing Status](/api-reference/documents/get-document-indexing-status) to track progress.

indexing_technique.description: Required when adding the first document to a knowledge base. Subsequent documents inherit the knowledge base's indexing technique if omitted. `high_quality` uses embedding models for precise search; `economy` uses keyword-based indexing.

doc_form.description: `text_model` for standard text chunking, `hierarchical_model` for parent-child chunk structure, `qa_model` for question-answer pair extraction.

doc_language.description: Language of the document for processing optimization.

mode.description: Processing mode. `automatic` uses built-in rules, `custom` allows manual configuration, `hierarchical` enables parent-child chunk structure (use with `doc_form: hierarchical_model`).

enabled.description: Whether this preprocessing rule is enabled.

retrieval_model.description: Retrieval model configuration. Controls how chunks are searched and ranked when querying this knowledge base.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model name. Use the `model` field from [Get Available Models](/api-reference/models/get-available-models) with `model_type=text-embedding`.

embedding_model_provider.description: Embedding model provider. Use the `provider` field from [Get Available Models](/api-reference/models/get-available-models) with `model_type=text-embedding`.

batch.description: Batch ID for tracking indexing progress.

400.description:
- `provider_not_initialize` : No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
- `invalid_param` : Knowledge base does not exist. / indexing_technique is required. / Invalid doc_form (must be `text_model`, `hierarchical_model`, or `qa_model`).

value.message: No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.

post.description: Create a document by uploading a file. Supports common document formats (PDF, TXT, DOCX, etc.). Processing is asynchronous — use the returned `batch` ID with [Get Document Indexing Status](/api-reference/documents/get-document-indexing-status) to track progress.

data.description: JSON string containing configuration. Accepts the same fields as [Create Document by Text](/api-reference/documents/create-document-by-text) (`indexing_technique`, `doc_form`, `doc_language`, `process_rule`, `retrieval_model`, `embedding_model`, `embedding_model_provider`) except `name` and `text`.

batch.description: Batch ID for tracking indexing progress.

400.description:
- `no_file_uploaded` : Please upload your file.
- `too_many_files` : Only one file is allowed.
- `filename_not_exists_error` : The specified filename does not exist.
- `provider_not_initialize` : No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
- `invalid_param` : Knowledge base does not exist, external datasets not supported, file too large, unsupported file type, missing required fields, or invalid doc_form (must be `text_model`, `hierarchical_model`, or `qa_model`).

value.message: The specified filename does not exist.
No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of documents in the knowledge base. Supports filtering by keyword and indexing status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Server caps at `100`.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter by document name.

has_more.description: Whether more items exist on the next page.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific document, including its indexing status, metadata, and processing statistics.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: `all` returns all fields including metadata. `only` returns only `id`, `doc_type`, and `doc_metadata`. `without` returns all fields except `doc_metadata`.

200.description: Document details. The response shape varies based on the `metadata` query parameter. When `metadata` is `only`, only `id`, `doc_type`, and `doc_metadata` are returned. When `metadata` is `without`, `doc_type` and `doc_metadata` are omitted.

position.description: Position index within the knowledge base.

data_source_type.description: How the document was uploaded. `upload_file` for file uploads, `notion_import` for Notion imports.

dataset_process_rule_id.description: ID of the processing rule applied to this document.

created_from.description: Origin of the document. `api` for API creation, `web` for UI creation.

created_by.description: ID of the user who created the document.

tokens.description: Number of tokens in the document.

error.description: Error message if indexing failed, `null` otherwise.

enabled.description: Whether the document is enabled for retrieval.

disabled_at.description: Unix timestamp when the document was disabled, `null` if enabled.

disabled_by.description: ID of the user who disabled the document, `null` if enabled.

display_status.description: Display-friendly indexing status for the UI.

word_count.description: Total word count of the document.

hit_count.description: Number of times this document has been retrieved.

doc_form.description: Document chunking mode. `text_model` for standard text, `hierarchical_model` for parent-child, `qa_model` for QA pairs.

doc_type.description: Document type classification, `null` if not set.

doc_metadata.description: Custom metadata key-value pairs for this document.

value.description: Metadata field value for this document.

completed_at.description: Unix timestamp when processing completed, `null` if not yet completed.

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp of last update, `null` if never updated.

indexing_latency.description: Time taken for indexing in seconds, `null` if not completed.

segment_count.description: Number of chunks in the document.

summary_index_status.description: Status of summary indexing, `null` if summary index is not enabled.

need_summary.description: Whether the document needs summary generation.

400.description: `invalid_metadata` : Invalid metadata value for the specified key.

delete.description: Permanently delete a document and all its chunks from the knowledge base.

403.description: `archived_document_immutable` : The archived document is not editable.

value.message: The archived document is not editable.

get.description: Get a signed download URL for a document's original uploaded file.

url.description: Signed URL to download the original uploaded file.

403.description: `forbidden` : No permission to access this document.

get.description: Check the indexing progress of documents in a batch. Returns the current processing stage and chunk completion counts for each document. Poll this endpoint until `indexing_status` reaches `completed` or `error`. The status progresses through: `waiting` → `parsing` → `cleaning` → `splitting` → `indexing` → `completed`.

parameters.name: batch
parameters.description: Batch ID returned from document creation.

200.description: Indexing status for documents in the batch.

paused_at.description: Timestamp when indexing was paused. `null` if not paused.

error.description: Error message if indexing failed. `null` if no error.

stopped_at.description: Timestamp when indexing was stopped. `null` if not stopped.

completed_segments.description: Number of chunks that have been indexed.

total_segments.description: Total number of chunks to be indexed.

404.description: `not_found` : Knowledge base not found. / Documents not found.

post.description: Update an existing document's text content, name, or processing configuration. Re-triggers indexing if content changes — use the returned `batch` ID with [Get Document Indexing Status](/api-reference/documents/get-document-indexing-status) to track progress.

name.description: Document name. Required when `text` is provided.

mode.description: Processing mode. `automatic` uses built-in rules, `custom` allows manual configuration, `hierarchical` enables parent-child chunk structure (use with `doc_form: hierarchical_model`).

enabled.description: Whether this preprocessing rule is enabled.

doc_form.description: `text_model` for standard text chunking, `hierarchical_model` for parent-child chunk structure, `qa_model` for question-answer pair extraction.

doc_language.description: Language of the document for processing optimization.

retrieval_model.description: Retrieval model configuration. Controls how chunks are searched and ranked when querying this knowledge base.

batch.description: Batch ID for tracking indexing progress.

400.description:
- `provider_not_initialize` : No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
- `invalid_param` : Knowledge base does not exist, name is required when text is provided, or invalid doc_form (must be `text_model`, `hierarchical_model`, or `qa_model`).

value.message: No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
name is required when text is provided.

post.description: Update an existing document by uploading a new file. Re-triggers indexing — use the returned `batch` ID with [Get Document Indexing Status](/api-reference/documents/get-document-indexing-status) to track progress.

data.description: JSON string containing configuration. Accepts the same fields as [Create Document by Text](/api-reference/documents/create-document-by-text) (`indexing_technique`, `doc_form`, `doc_language`, `process_rule`, `retrieval_model`, `embedding_model`, `embedding_model_provider`) except `name` and `text`.

batch.description: Batch ID for tracking indexing progress.

400.description:
- `too_many_files` : Only one file is allowed.
- `filename_not_exists_error` : The specified filename does not exist.
- `provider_not_initialize` : No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
- `invalid_param` : Knowledge base does not exist, external datasets not supported, file too large, unsupported file type, or invalid doc_form (must be `text_model`, `hierarchical_model`, or `qa_model`).

value.message: The specified filename does not exist.
No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.

post.description: Download multiple uploaded-file documents as a single ZIP archive. Accepts up to `100` document IDs.

document_ids.description: Array of document IDs to include in the ZIP archive.

200.description: ZIP archive containing the requested documents.

patch.description: Enable, disable, archive, or unarchive multiple documents at once.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: `enable` to activate, `disable` to deactivate, `archive` to archive, `un_archive` to restore from archive.

document_ids.description: List of document IDs to update.

post.description: Create one or more chunks within a document. Each chunk can include optional keywords and an answer field (for QA-mode documents).

segments.description: Array of chunk objects to create.

doc_form.description: Document chunking mode used by this document.

data.content: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform.

404.description: `not_found` : Document is not completed or is disabled.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of chunks within a document. Supports filtering by keyword and status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Server caps at `100`.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter chunks by indexing status, e.g. `completed`, `indexing`, `error`.

doc_form.description: Document chunking mode used by this document.

has_more.description: Whether more items exist on the next page.

data.content: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific chunk, including its content, keywords, and indexing status.

doc_form.description: Document chunking mode used by this document.

data.content: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform.

post.description: Update a chunk's content, keywords, or answer. Re-triggers indexing for the modified chunk.

doc_form.description: Document chunking mode used by this document.

data.content: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform.

delete.description: Permanently delete a chunk from the document.

post.description: Create a child chunk under a parent chunk. Only available for documents using the `hierarchical_model` chunking mode.

value.message: Create child chunk index failed: {error details}

get.description: Returns a paginated list of child chunks under a specific parent chunk.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Server caps at `100`.

patch.description: Update the content of an existing child chunk.

value.message: Create child chunk index failed: {error details}

delete.description: Permanently delete a child chunk from its parent chunk.

value.message: Delete child chunk index failed: {error details}

post.summary: Retrieve Chunks from a Knowledge Base / Test Retrieval
post.description: Performs a search query against a knowledge base to retrieve the most relevant chunks. This endpoint can be used for both production retrieval and test retrieval.

retrieval_model.description: Retrieval model configuration. Controls how chunks are searched and ranked when querying this knowledge base.

external_retrieval_model.description: Retrieval settings for external knowledge bases.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return.

score_threshold.description: Minimum relevance score threshold for filtering results.

score_threshold_enabled.description: Whether score threshold filtering is enabled.

attachment_ids.description: List of attachment IDs to include in the retrieval context.

segment.description: Matched chunk from the knowledge base.

position.description: Position of the chunk within the document.

document_id.description: ID of the document this chunk belongs to.

sign_content.description: Signed content hash for integrity verification.

answer.description: Answer content, used in Q&A mode documents.

word_count.description: Word count of the chunk content.

tokens.description: Token count of the chunk content.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with this chunk for keyword-based retrieval.

index_node_id.description: ID of the index node in the vector store.

index_node_hash.description: Hash of the indexed content, used to detect changes.

hit_count.description: Number of times this chunk has been matched in retrieval queries.

enabled.description: Whether the chunk is enabled for retrieval.

disabled_at.description: Timestamp when the chunk was disabled. `null` if enabled.

disabled_by.description: ID of the user who disabled the chunk. `null` if enabled.

created_by.description: ID of the user who created the chunk.

indexing_at.description: Timestamp when indexing started. `null` if not yet started.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when indexing completed. `null` if not yet completed.

error.description: Error message if indexing failed. `null` when no error.

stopped_at.description: Timestamp when indexing was stopped. `null` if not stopped.

document.description: Parent document information for the matched chunk.

doc_type.description: Document type classification. `null` if not set.

doc_metadata.description: Metadata values for the document. `null` if no metadata is configured.

child_chunks.description: Matched child chunks within the chunk, if using hierarchical indexing.

id.description: Unique identifier of the child chunk.

content.description: Text content of the child chunk.

position.description: Position of the child chunk within the parent chunk.

score.description: Relevance score of the child chunk.

summary.description: Summary content if retrieved via summary index.

segment.content: Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform.

400.description:
- `dataset_not_initialized` : The dataset is still being initialized or indexing. Please wait a moment.
- `provider_not_initialize` : No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
- `provider_quota_exceeded` : Your quota for Dify Hosted OpenAI has been exhausted. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your own provider credentials.
- `model_currently_not_support` : Dify Hosted OpenAI trial currently not support the GPT-4 model.
- `completion_request_error` : Completion request failed.
- `invalid_param` : Invalid parameter value.

value.message: The dataset is still being initialized or indexing. Please wait a moment.
No valid model provider credentials found. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your provider credentials.
Your quota for Dify Hosted OpenAI has been exhausted. Please go to Settings -> Model Provider to complete your own provider credentials.
Dify Hosted OpenAI trial currently not support the GPT-4 model.

500.description: `internal_server_error` : An internal error occurred during retrieval.

post.description: Create a new tag for organizing knowledge bases.

type.description: Tag type. Always `knowledge` for knowledge base tags.

binding_count.description: Number of knowledge bases bound to this tag.

get.description: Returns the list of all knowledge base tags in the workspace.

type.description: Tag type. Always `knowledge` for knowledge base tags.

binding_count.description: Number of knowledge bases bound to this tag.

patch.description: Rename an existing knowledge base tag.

type.description: Tag type. Always `knowledge` for knowledge base tags.

binding_count.description: Number of knowledge bases bound to this tag.

delete.description: Permanently delete a knowledge base tag. Does not delete the knowledge bases that were tagged.

post.description: Bind one or more tags to a knowledge base. A knowledge base can have multiple tags.
Remove a tag binding from a knowledge base.

get.description: Returns the list of tags bound to a specific knowledge base.

200.description: Tags bound to the knowledge base.

data.description: List of tags bound to this knowledge base.

total.description: Total number of tags bound to this knowledge base.

post.description: Create a custom metadata field for the knowledge base. Metadata fields can be used to annotate documents with structured information.

type.description: `string` for text values, `number` for numeric values, `time` for date/time values.

get.description: Returns the list of all metadata fields (both custom and built-in) for the knowledge base, along with the count of documents using each field.

200.description: Metadata fields for the knowledge base.

count.description: Number of documents using this metadata field.

built_in_field_enabled.description: Whether built-in metadata fields are enabled for this knowledge base.

delete.description: Permanently delete a custom metadata field. Documents using this field will lose their metadata values for it.

get.description: Returns the list of built-in metadata fields provided by the system (e.g., document type, source URL).

name.description: Built-in field identifier. `document_name` for the document title, `uploader` for the creator, `upload_date` for creation time, `last_update_date` for last modification time, `source` for the document origin.

type.description: Field data type. `string` for text values, `time` for date/time values.

post.description: Enable or disable built-in metadata fields for the knowledge base.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: `enable` to activate built-in metadata fields, `disable` to deactivate them.

post.description: Update metadata values for multiple documents at once. Each document in the request receives the specified metadata key-value pairs.

document_id.description: ID of the document whose metadata to update.

value.description: Metadata value. Can be a string, number, or `null`.

partial_update.description: Whether to partially update metadata, keeping existing values for unspecified fields.

operation_data.description: Array of document metadata update operations. Each entry maps a document ID to its metadata key-value pairs.

get.description: Retrieve the list of available models by type. Primarily used to query `text-embedding` and `rerank` models for knowledge base configuration.

parameters.name: model_type
parameters.description: Type of model to retrieve. For knowledge base configuration, use `text-embedding` for embedding models or `rerank` for reranking models.

200.description: Available models for the specified type.

data.description: List of model providers with their available models.

label.description: Localized display name of the provider.

icon_small.description: URL of the provider's small icon.

icon_large.description: URL of the provider's large icon.

status.description: Provider status. `active` when credentials are configured and valid.

models.description: List of available models from this provider.

model.description: Model identifier. Use this as the `embedding_model` value when creating or updating a knowledge base.

label.description: Localized display name of the model.

model_type.description: Type of the model, matching the `model_type` path parameter.

features.description: Supported features of the model, `null` if none.

fetch_from.description: Where the model definition comes from. `predefined-model` for built-in models, `customizable-model` for user-configured models.

status.description: Model availability status. `active` when ready to use.

post.description: Upload a file for use in a knowledge pipeline. Accepts a single file via `multipart/form-data`.

id.description: Unique identifier of the uploaded file.

created_by.description: ID of the user who uploaded the file.

400.description:
- `no_file_uploaded` : Please upload your file.
- `filename_not_exists_error` : The specified filename does not exist.
- `too_many_files` : Only one file is allowed.

value.message: The specified filename does not exist.

get.description: List all datasource plugins available for a knowledge pipeline. Returns published or draft plugins depending on the `is_published` query parameter.

parameters.name: is_published
parameters.description: Whether to retrieve published or draft datasource plugins. `true` returns published plugins, `false` returns draft plugins.

id.description: Unique identifier of the datasource plugin.

name.description: Display name of the datasource plugin.

post.description: Execute a single datasource node within the knowledge pipeline. Returns a streaming response with the node execution results.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description: ID of the datasource node to execute.

inputs.description: Input variables for the datasource node.

credential_id.description: ID of the credential to use for authentication with the datasource.

is_published.description: Whether to run the published or draft version of the node. `true` runs the published version, `false` runs the draft.

200.description: Streaming response with node execution events.

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream containing node execution progress and results.

post.description: Execute the full knowledge pipeline for a knowledge base. Supports both streaming and blocking response modes.

datasource_info_list.description: List of datasource information objects for the pipeline to process.

start_node_id.description: ID of the node to start pipeline execution from.

is_published.description: Whether to run the published or draft version of the pipeline. `true` runs the published version, `false` runs the draft.

response_mode.description: Response mode for the pipeline execution. `streaming` returns a Server-Sent Events stream, `blocking` waits and returns the complete result.

200.description: Pipeline execution result. Format depends on `response_mode`: streaming returns a `text/event-stream`, blocking returns a JSON object.

schema.description: Server-Sent Events stream containing pipeline execution progress and results. Returned when `response_mode` is `streaming`.
Complete pipeline execution result. Returned when `response_mode` is `blocking`.

id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base.

name.description: Display name of the knowledge base. Unique within the workspace.

description.description: Optional text describing the purpose or contents of the knowledge base.

provider.description: Provider type. `vendor` for internally managed, `external` for external knowledge base connections.

permission.description: Controls who can access this knowledge base. Possible values: `only_me`, `all_team_members`, `partial_members`.

data_source_type.description: Data source type of the documents, `null` if not yet configured.

indexing_technique.description: `high_quality` uses embedding models for precise search; `economy` uses keyword-based indexing.

app_count.description: Number of applications currently using this knowledge base.

document_count.description: Total number of documents in the knowledge base.

word_count.description: Total word count across all documents.

created_by.description: ID of the user who created the knowledge base.

updated_by.description: ID of the user who last updated the knowledge base.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp (Unix epoch in seconds).

embedding_model.description: Name of the embedding model used for indexing.

embedding_model_provider.description: Embedding model provider. Use the `provider` field from [Get Available Models](/api-reference/models/get-available-models) with `model_type=text-embedding`.

embedding_available.description: Whether the configured embedding model is currently available.

retrieval_model_dict.description: Retrieval configuration for the knowledge base.

search_method.description: Search method used for retrieval. `keyword_search` for keyword matching, `semantic_search` for embedding-based similarity, `full_text_search` for full-text indexing, `hybrid_search` for a combination of semantic and keyword approaches.

reranking_mode.description: Reranking mode. `reranking_model` for model-based reranking, `weighted_score` for score-based weighting. `null` if reranking is disabled.

reranking_provider_name.description: Provider name of the reranking model.

weight_type.description: Strategy for balancing semantic and keyword search weights.

vector_weight.description: Weight assigned to semantic (vector) search results.

embedding_provider_name.description: Provider of the embedding model used for vector search.

embedding_model_name.description: Name of the embedding model used for vector search.

keyword_weight.description: Weight assigned to keyword search results.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return.

score_threshold_enabled.description: Whether score threshold filtering is enabled.

score_threshold.description: Minimum relevance score for results. Only effective when `score_threshold_enabled` is `true`.

model_name.description: Name of the model used for generating summaries.

model_provider_name.description: Provider of the summary generation model.

summary_prompt.description: Prompt template used for summary generation.

tags.description: Tags associated with this knowledge base.

type.description: Tag type. Always `knowledge` for knowledge base tags.

doc_form.description: Document chunking mode. `text_model` for standard text chunking, `hierarchical_model` for parent-child structure, `qa_model` for QA pair extraction.

external_knowledge_info.description: Connection details for external knowledge bases. Present when `provider` is `external`.

external_knowledge_id.description: ID of the external knowledge base.

external_knowledge_api_id.description: ID of the external knowledge API connection.

external_knowledge_api_name.description: Display name of the external knowledge API.

external_knowledge_api_endpoint.description: Endpoint URL of the external knowledge API.

external_retrieval_model.description: Retrieval settings for external knowledge bases. `null` for internal knowledge bases.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return from the external knowledge base.

score_threshold_enabled.description: Whether score threshold filtering is enabled.

doc_metadata.description: Metadata field definitions for the knowledge base.

built_in_field_enabled.description: Whether built-in metadata fields (e.g., `document_name`, `uploader`) are enabled.

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline ID, if a custom processing pipeline is configured.

icon_info.description: Icon display configuration for the knowledge base.

icon_url.description: URL of a custom icon image.

is_published.description: Whether the knowledge base is published.

total_available_documents.description: Number of documents that are enabled and available.

enable_api.description: Whether API access is enabled for this knowledge base.

is_multimodal.description: Whether multimodal content processing is enabled.

position.description: Display position of the document in the list.

data_source_type.description: How the document was created. `upload_file` for file uploads, `notion_import` for Notion imports.

data_source_info.description: Raw data source information, varies by `data_source_type`.

data_source_detail_dict.description: Detailed data source information including file details.

dataset_process_rule_id.description: ID of the processing rule applied to this document.

created_from.description: Origin of the document. `api` for API creation, `web` for UI creation.

created_by.description: ID of the user who created the document.

tokens.description: Total number of tokens in the document.

indexing_status.description: Current indexing status. `waiting` for queued, `parsing` while extracting content, `cleaning` while removing noise, `splitting` while chunking, `indexing` while building vectors, `completed` when ready, `error` if failed, `paused` if manually paused.

error.description: Error message if indexing failed. `null` when no error.

enabled.description: Whether the document is enabled for retrieval.

disabled_at.description: Timestamp when the document was disabled. `null` if enabled.

disabled_by.description: ID of the user who disabled the document. `null` if enabled.

display_status.description: User-facing display status derived from `indexing_status` and `enabled` state.

word_count.description: Total word count of the document.

hit_count.description: Number of times the document has been matched in retrieval queries.

doc_form.description: Document chunking mode. `text_model` for standard text chunking, `hierarchical_model` for parent-child structure, `qa_model` for QA pair extraction.

doc_metadata.description: Metadata values assigned to this document.

summary_index_status.description: Status of the summary index for this document. `null` if summary indexing is not configured.

need_summary.description: Whether a summary needs to be generated for this document.

position.description: Position of the chunk within the document.

document_id.description: ID of the document this chunk belongs to.

sign_content.description: Signed content hash for integrity verification.

answer.description: Answer content, used in Q&A mode documents.

word_count.description: Word count of the chunk content.

tokens.description: Token count of the chunk content.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with this chunk for keyword-based retrieval.

index_node_id.description: ID of the index node in the vector store.

index_node_hash.description: Hash of the indexed content, used to detect changes.

hit_count.description: Number of times this chunk has been matched in retrieval queries.

enabled.description: Whether the chunk is enabled for retrieval.

disabled_at.description: Timestamp when the chunk was disabled. `null` if enabled.

disabled_by.description: ID of the user who disabled the chunk. `null` if enabled.

status.description: Current indexing status of the chunk, e.g. `completed`, `indexing`, `error`.

created_by.description: ID of the user who created the chunk.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp (Unix epoch in seconds).

updated_by.description: ID of the user who last updated the chunk.

indexing_at.description: Timestamp when indexing started. `null` if not yet started.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when indexing completed. `null` if not yet completed.

error.description: Error message if indexing failed. `null` when no error.

stopped_at.description: Timestamp when indexing was stopped. `null` if not stopped.

child_chunks.description: Child chunks belonging to this chunk. Only present for hierarchical mode documents.

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the chunk content. `null` if summary indexing is not enabled.

id.description: Unique identifier of the child chunk.

segment_id.description: ID of the parent chunk this child chunk belongs to.

content.description: Text content of the child chunk.

position.description: Position of the child chunk within the parent chunk.

word_count.description: Word count of the child chunk content.

type.description: How the child chunk was created. `automatic` for system-generated, `custom` for manually created.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp (Unix epoch in seconds).

reranking_provider_name.description: Provider name of the reranking model.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return.

score_threshold_enabled.description: Whether score threshold filtering is enabled.

score_threshold.description: Minimum relevance score for results. Only effective when `score_threshold_enabled` is `true`.

weight_type.description: Strategy for balancing semantic and keyword search weights.

vector_weight.description: Weight assigned to semantic (vector) search results.

embedding_provider_name.description: Provider of the embedding model used for vector search.

embedding_model_name.description: Name of the embedding model used for vector search.

keyword_weight.description: Weight assigned to keyword search results.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API Key authentication. For all API requests, include your API Key in the `Authorization` HTTP Header, prefixed with `Bearer `. Example: `Authorization: Bearer {API_KEY}`. **Strongly recommend storing your API Key on the server-side, not shared or stored on the client-side, to avoid possible API-Key leakage that can lead to serious consequences.**
